profile.name: Krishna Verma
profile.bio: B.Tech CSE (AI & ML) @NST-ADYPU| Curious mind | Building from first principles ⚙️

prs.title: Added logo style, navbar navigation
prs.body:
This PR addresses Issue #3 by improving the navigation bar styling and responsiveness.

Changes included:
- Enhanced header layout to behave as a proper navigation bar
- Improved nav link spacing, hover states, and click areas
- Added basic responsive behavior for smaller screens
- Introduced optional active link styling for future use

These changes are limited to CSS only and do not affect existing page structure or functionality.

Fixes #3

prs.title: Initial project setup with README, folder structure and basic landing page
prs.body:
This PR sets up the initial foundation for the SuperHero-Hub project.

Changes included:
- Added a project README outlining the vision and scope
- Created a basic folder structure for pages, CSS, and JavaScript
- Implemented a simple landing page with placeholders for Marvel, DC, and Indian superhero universes
- Added minimal global CSS for layout and readability

No frameworks or advanced features are included at this stage. This PR focuses only on establishing a clean and scalable base for future development.

Fixes #1

prs.title: CSS and JS paths fixed in index
prs.body: CSS and JS paths fixed in index

prs.title: Revise README with comprehensive project details
prs.body: Expanded the README to include detailed features, target users, benefits, tech stack, usage instructions, resources, contribution guidelines, and license information.

prs.title: Add cosmic login page
prs.body:
### Description

# 🌌 Cosmic Login Page

A modern, responsive login page with a glowing cosmic gradient background and floating label inputs.

## ✨ Features
- Responsive design
- Smooth input animations
- Glassmorphism effect
- Gradient background
- Hover transitions on the login button

## 🧠 Tech Used
- HTML5
- CSS3 (Flexbox, gradients, transitions)

### Checklist

- [ ] I've been assigned an issue related to this PR.
- [ ] I've used beautifiers.
- [x] I've added my Project's name and description to `Index.md`
- [x] I've made a README.md file for my Project.
- [x] The README.md file of my projrct contains Project title, Description, Use of project, Set up, Stack used and Output (Screenshots). 

## Related Issues or Pull Requests number

(Write your answer here.)

issues.title: Add navigation bar for Marvel, DC and Indian superhero sections
issues.body:
Create a responsive navigation bar on the landing page that allows users to navigate to:
- Marvel Universe
- DC Universe
- Indian Superhero Universe

issues.title: Initial project setup: README, structure & basic landing page
